title: Craftable Tombstones
description: Adds a simple craftable tombstone block for decoration.
body:
**Craftable Tombstones** is a simple mod that adds a decorative tombstone for your builds! The model/texture is highly inspired by Terraria.

The crafting recipe uses stone and is as follows:
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3010bea8b6cace1184897761e35e13e050f51369.png)
